gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/326)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/326)

parts.text: أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ أَوْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليهما السلام )

text: مَنْ قَنِعَ بِمَا رَزَقَهُ اللَّهُ فَهُوَ مِنْ أَغْنَى النَّاسِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ibn Fazzal, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Abu Hamza,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, or Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who is content with what Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has Graced him, so he is from the richest of the people’.
en.sarwar: 9. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from ibn Faddal from ‘Asim ibn Humayd from abu Hamza from abu Ja’far or abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever is content with what Allah has given him for his sustenance is the richest person of the people.”
